scripts.title: Frozen Giants Awaken
scripts.concept: POV: You just discovered dinosaurs that lived in the Arctic

shots.visual: Extreme close-up of massive dinosaur eye frozen in ice, camera slowly pulling back to reveal full skull embedded in glacier wall, dramatic lighting with blue-white ice crystals
shots.text_overlay: POV: Scientists just found THIS in the Arctic
shots.camera: Slow zoom out from macro to wide

shots.visual: Massive feathered T-Rex skeleton towering over amazed child, aurora borealis projection dancing across museum ceiling, ice cave environment with prehistoric footprints in snow
shots.camera: Low angle looking up, slow orbit around skeleton

shots.visual: Kids' faces illuminated by interactive dig site, hands brushing snow off fossil, parents pointing in amazement at 40-foot wingspan pterosaur hanging above
Exhibition logo materializes from ice crystals against black background, ticket counter with 'SELLING FAST' digital display visible

music.build: Soft mystery → building wonder → explosive awe → urgent finish
music.reference_track: Similar to Jurassic Park theme meets Arctic documentary score

scripts.caption: Scientists found dinosaurs that lived in SNOW ❄️ First time ever displayed. Kids lose their minds. Adults too. Link in bio for tickets (they're going fast) 🦕 #IceDinosaurs #NewDiscovery #FamilyFun #ScienceIsAwesome #MuseumLife

scripts.title: Arctic Giants Experience
scripts.concept: Step into a world where dinosaurs ruled frozen landscapes

shots.visual: First-person POV walking through museum entrance, doors opening to reveal massive ice cave with aurora lights, breath visible in cold air effect
shots.text_overlay: POV: You just walked into the Ice Age

shots.visual: Massive woolly dinosaur skeleton with thick feathers, snow falling around it, dramatic uplighting creating shadows on ice walls
shots.camera: Dramatic low angle, slow tilt up

shots.visual: Interactive fossil dig with families, kids using brushes on ice blocks, discovering bones, excitement and discovery on faces
shots.camera: Overhead shot, then close-ups of hands

shots.visual: Flying pterosaur animatronic with 40-foot wingspan soaring overhead, visitors ducking and pointing, aurora projection creating magical atmosphere
Immersive ice cave environment with prehistoric plants, snow effects, temperature-controlled exhibit space with visible breath
Rapid montage: kid's amazed face, couple taking selfie with massive skull, educator pointing at fossil, family laughing together
Real visitor testimonial footage: 'I've never seen anything like this' with exhibition in background, authentic amazement
Exhibition logo with location and dates, ticket website URL, 'Limited Time Only' badge, countdown timer showing days remaining

music.build: Mystery → wonder → adventure → emotional peak → urgent call
music.reference_track: Similar to Planet Earth meets Marvel trailer music

scripts.caption: The Arctic held secrets for 100 million years. Now they're here. Ice Dinosaurs features newly discovered species never before displayed anywhere. Book now - limited engagement. 🦕❄️ #IceDinosaurs @theimagineteam

scripts.title: Frozen in Time
scripts.concept: Cinematic journey through prehistoric Arctic world

shots.visual: Black screen with text 'For 100 million years, they waited...' then dramatic reveal of massive glacier cracking open to reveal dinosaur skeleton
shots.audio: Silence, then deep ice cracking sound
shots.camera: Static text, then dramatic push into glacier

shots.visual: Sweeping aerial shot of pristine Arctic landscape, camera diving down through ice layers revealing fossilized remains embedded in walls
Extreme close-up of paleontologist's gloved hands carefully brushing snow from massive dinosaur skull, revealing intricate bone structure and feather impressions
shots.audio: Soft, wonder-filled music with brush sounds

shots.visual: Museum transformation: walls morph from modern to ice cave, aurora borealis projections activate, massive skeletons rise into position, snow begins falling
Epic reveal of main exhibition hall: 50-foot feathered T-Rex in hunting pose, surrounded by ice formations, aurora dancing overhead, visitors tiny in comparison
Fast-paced montage: pterosaur soaring overhead, kids digging in interactive site, families amazed by massive skulls, educators explaining discoveries
Emotional moments: child's face illuminated by exhibit lighting showing pure wonder, parent and child pointing together, elderly couple holding hands in amazement
Real visitor testimonial: diverse family speaking directly to camera 'This changed how we see dinosaurs forever' with exhibition glowing behind them
shots.text_overlay: "This changed how we see dinosaurs forever"
shots.audio: Natural testimonial audio with subtle music

shots.visual: Ice Dinosaurs logo materializes from swirling snow, location details and ticket information appear, countdown timer showing limited engagement
shots.text_overlay: ICE DINOSAURS • Now Open • Limited Time

music.style: Epic cinematic orchestral with arctic ambient elements
music.build: Mysterious opening → wonder → epic adventure → emotional peak → triumphant finale
music.reference_track: Similar to Interstellar meets Frozen meets Jurassic Park

scripts.caption: 100 million years ago, giants ruled the Arctic. Revolutionary discoveries reveal dinosaurs like never before seen. Ice Dinosaurs brings these frozen titans to life through groundbreaking science and immersive experience. Now open for limited engagement. Book your journey into prehistoric wonder. 🦕❄️ #IceDinosaurs #NewDiscovery #FamilyAdventure @theimagineteam
scripts.cta: Experience Ice Dinosaurs → Book now at [website]
